name: Homesty.ai
description: Production AI advisor on Next.js 15 + pgvector + GPT-4o + Claude. Solo-built. Refusal-first retrieval and mid-stream guardrails were extracted from this work into Anchor and Tripwire — same engine, both public.

name: Anchor
tagline: Provenance-first RAG that refuses to hallucinate.
description: Cosine-floor retrieval returns chunks when similarity is high, refuses when it isn't. Postgres + pgvector + Next.js. Live playground available.

name: Codecraft AI
tagline: In-browser AI IDE. WebContainer-backed live coding playground.
description: Boots a real Vite + React dev server in the browser tab via WebContainers. Editable Monaco is wired to the WebContainer filesystem with debounced writes and sub-2s hot-reload; an xterm terminal runs real shell commands; an IndexedDB snapshot cache drops repeat-visit boot under 20s. COOP/COEP cross-origin isolation is what makes SharedArrayBuffer and the in-tab runtime work.

name: Tripwire
tagline: Mid-stream LLM safety. Catch the lie before the user finishes reading it.
description: Pattern engine watches LLM streams token-by-token, aborts on rule trip. Sub-millisecond decision latency. Ships an OpenAI-compatible sidecar proxy (POST /v1/chat/completions) that streams responses through the guard and aborts mid-stream on a trip.

name: Goldset
tagline: Golden datasets + LLM-as-judge + structural assertions, as a GitHub Action.
description: Three eval runners (golden dataset, LLM-as-judge with a pluggable OpenAI/Anthropic provider, structural assertions), packaged as a GitHub Action that runs on every PR, posts a delta-vs-base comment, and blocks the merge on regression.

name: Quickdraw
tagline: Benchmark LLM streaming. TTFT, TPS, $/1K tokens.
description: CLI runs prompt sets against models, captures TTFT + tokens/sec, diffs against baseline. Nightly bench wired.

name: Stackup
tagline: Production Kubernetes locally in 10 minutes. ArgoCD + Argo Rollouts + Grafana.
description: make up bootstraps a kind cluster with ArgoCD, Argo Rollouts, and Grafana/Prometheus. For learning real k8s without a cloud bill.

name: Anvil
tagline: Idempotent webhook → BullMQ pipeline. HMAC-SHA256, backoff, dead-letter replay.
description: Verify (constant-time HMAC) → dedupe → enqueue → retry [1s, 5s, 30s, 5m] → dead-letter → replay. pnpm workspace; 5 design contracts proven by tests in CI. v0.0.1.
